1.content:
Everyone was enjoying the game until the crowd camera showed which sibling or siblings embarrassing moment. Was it Bart as he wet himself? If not Bart was it Lisa as she wet herself from laughing at the way Bart and Homer were dancing. If not Bart nor Lisa was it Maggie stripping naked and going potty. Was it all three siblings Bart and Lisa wet themselves and Maggie is stripping naked and going potty.

(a) Bart wet himself
(b) Lisa wet herself
(c) Maggie is stripping naked and going potty
(d) all of the above
(e) no that's what happened last year! this year it's drunk Homer butt naked and dancing for the camera
1.title: Which sibling or siblings caused it to happen?

13.content:
Does her family notice and stop her? What does Mel say when he sees what she's doing on camera?

(a) Marge sees her and quickly puts at least her diaper back on.
(b) Bart sees her and immediately stands in front of her and starts dancing. So that nobody can see her on camera.
(c) Lisa sees her and immediately puts her in her diaper bag and runs her to the ladies room.
(d) look everyone that little girl is butt naked and tinkling.
(e) look everyone that little girl is butt naked and taking a dump.
13.title: (c)

131.content:
Did Marge actually see her early enough? If so did she let Maggie go in her diaper or have Bart or Lisa take Maggie to the restroom?

(a) Marge was a little too late and caught Maggie going potty. Did Marge re diaper Maggie or just let Maggie continue going potty?
(b) Marge put the diaper on Maggie, but let Maggie use her diaper instead having Bart or Lisa take her to the restroom.
(c) Marge put the diaper on Maggie and told either Bart or Lisa to take Maggie to the restroom before she goes potty in her diaper.
131.title: (a)

132.content:
While Bart is dancing in front of Maggie. Does Lisa or Marge catch Maggie naked before she goes potty? If Marge does catch Maggie naked before she goes potty, does she just put a diaper on Maggie or puts a diaper on Maggie and has Lisa take Maggie to the restroom? If Lisa does catch Maggie naked before she goes potty, what does Lisa do?

(a) neither Lisa or Marge catch Maggie naked until Maggie is almost done going potty.
(b) Marge does catch Maggie naked before she starts going potty, but can't decide on either to just put a diaper on her or put a diaper on her and tell Lisa to take Maggie to the restroom.
(c) Lisa does catch Maggie naked before she going potty, but how does Lisa carry Maggie to the restroom. (a) Lisa just picks Maggie up and takes her to the restroom while she's still butt naked. (b) Lisa puts Maggie in the diaper bag and heads to the restroom with the diaper bag hanging off her shoulder. (c) puts a diaper on Maggie and either helps Maggie run to the restroom or carries Maggie to the restroom.
132.title: (b)

133.content:
Lisa does catch Maggie naked before she goes potty. So Lisa quickly put Maggie puts Maggie in the diaper bag runs to the restroom. The extra weight of her sister in the diaper bag slows Lisa down too much. Can Maggie hold it till Lisa gets her to a toilet? If not where does Maggie go potty?

(a) Lisa gets Maggie to the toilet and wastes no time in sitting Maggie down on the first available toilet.
(b) Maggie can't hold it anymore and goes potty all over the inside of the diaper bag.
(c) Maggie starts to feel like she's about to either pee or poop real soon in the diaper bag, and so she quickly puts a diaper on. Just time because immediately after she secured the diaper closed she starts either peeing or pooping the diaper.
133.title: (c)

info.brief_description: One if not all of the Simpson kids' embarrass their family
info.description:
Got the idea off the episode where Homer tickles Bart so much that Bart accidentally wets himself on camera.

But in this story Bart isn't the only possible cause of embarrassment, we'll find out what embarrassing thing Lisa did and Maggie did while at the game. Was did Maggie or Lisa also wet themselves or was theirs completely different?
info.pretty_title: An embarrassment at the football game
